title: VerificationDecision
description: Final moderation decision on a healthcare professional verification request. Consumed by admin-decide-verification Edge Function.

request_id.description: UUID of the verification_request being decided

reason_code.description: Required when decision is 'reject'. Provides the user with a clear rejection reason.

notes.description: Optional free-text moderator notes. Never shown to the user directly; internal audit trail only.

reviewer_id.description: UUID of the moderator who issued this decision (populated from auth.uid() server-side)

decided_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the decision was recorded

then.description: reason_code must be present when decision is reject
